notes: Safe rollback of public app DOM cleanup: v3-native-hints-cleanup no longer patches public/app.js.
Native MAX callback toast notifications like 'Открыто' and 'Главное меню' are suppressed through services/maxApi answerCallback wrapper.
Comment buttons now prefer direct APP_BASE_URL /app links over bot deep-links when APP_BASE_URL is available.
This build is intended to restore mini-app comments opening and remove native menu toast overlays.
